description: Structural contract for retrospective-report.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas). Retrospective fires on FAIL/WARN (v8.45.0+) and produces the structured lesson YAML.

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: what_happened
required_sections.fail_message: ## What Happened (or ANCHOR:what_happened) missing — Retrospective must describe the failure mode

required_sections.name: root_cause
required_sections.fail_message: ## Root Cause (or ANCHOR:root_cause) missing — Retrospective must extract the underlying cause, not just the symptom

required_sections.name: lesson
required_sections.fail_message: ## Lesson (or ANCHOR:lesson) missing — Retrospective must emit a reusable instinct/lesson

required_content.name: lesson_yaml_pointer
required_content.fail_message: lesson YAML pointer or lesson_id missing — Retrospective must produce a structured artifact under .evolve/instincts/lessons/
